rationale: Section 31.01 governs tax bill preparation and mailing procedures. It requires bills to state the type and amount of any partial exemption but does not set exemption amounts. A change to the homestead exemption amount under §11.13(b) would be automatically reflected in tax bills without requiring amendment to §31.01.
quote: state the type and amount of any partial exemption applicable to the property, indicating whether it applies to appraised or assessed value
_note: No direct conflict. Section 31.01 is procedural; it references exemption amounts but does not codify them. The (d-2) provisional billing provisions reference S.B. 4/S.B. 23 changes for 2025 only and would not be affected by a prospective §11.13(b) increase.
